info.name: Super Banking — MCP Server Tools
info.description:
Direct HTTP calls to the Super Banking MCP server (banking_mcp_server). Use MCP_SERVER_URL in the shared BX-Finance environment.

Endpoints documented here are served directly by the MCP server HTTP transport layer (HttpMCPTransport.ts). Start the MCP server with: cd banking_mcp_server && npm start

request.description:
Public MCP server discovery manifest. Returns serverInfo, capabilities, tools list, and oauth_metadata_url. No authentication required.

Spec: MCP Protocol discovery via /.well-known endpoint.

Sample response fields:
- serverInfo.name: Super Banking Banking MCP Server
- capabilities.tools: { listChanged: false }
- tools[]: list of available banking tools with inputSchema
- oauth_metadata_url: PingOne OIDC discovery URL

Returns recent MCP tool-call audit events from Redis (Upstash). The MCP server records every tool call, auth challenge, and consent request.

Optional query params:
- agentId: filter by agent ID
- operation: filter by tool name (e.g., get_account_balance)
- outcome: success | failure | challenge
- eventType: tool_call | auth_challenge | consent_request | session
- limit: max 200 (default 50)

Returns: { events: AuditEvent[], total: number }

Added Phase 34. Note: also accessible via the BFF proxy at {{BANKING_API_BASE_URL}}/api/mcp/audit
